game_name: Super Street Fighter II: The New Challengers

element_introduction_order.element: Eight original World Warriors (Ryu, Ken, Guile, E. Honda, Blanka, Dhalsim, Zangief, Chun-Li)
element_introduction_order.first_appears: Initial roster carryover from Street Fighter II
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player selects one character; opponents randomized from roster

element_introduction_order.element: Four new characters (Fei Long, Cammy, T. Hawk, Dee Jay)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: New character-specific move sets and playstyles expand matchup complexity

element_introduction_order.element: Character-specific new special techniques (Fire Hadōken, Flaming Shoryuken, Atomic Buster, Devil Reverse)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Refined balance and expanded tactical options for existing characters

element_introduction_order.element: Eight random opponents in arcade progression
Four Grand Masters (Balrog, Vega, Sagat, M. Bison) as final bosses
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Culmination of game challenge; final test of player skill

element_introduction_order.element: Combo scoring system tracking hits, first attacks, reversals, recoveries
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Quantified feedback loop encouraging advanced techniques and execution

element_introduction_order.element: Eight character color scheme options per character
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Cosmetic customization and variant visual identification

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Match-based pacing with round breaks; tension escalates through tournament progression; game speed reduced from Hyper Fighting to Champion Edition pace, allowing deliberate play

difficulty_curve.early_game: Random opponent selection from eight available fighters; variable difficulty dependent on player matchup knowledge
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Cumulative fatigue and pressure as tournament progresses through randomized opponent gauntlet
difficulty_curve.late_game: Four fixed Grand Masters appear in deterministic final sequence (Balrog, Vega, Sagat, M. Bison); known progression allows strategic preparation
notable_spikes: First encounter with new character type or playstyle
M. Bison final boss (character-tied narrative tension via Cammy's backstory connection)

notable_level_patterns.description: Eight randomized opponents followed by four fixed Grand Masters. Escalating challenge structure with known endgame sequence.
Each character has associated stage with new graphics and music remade for Super Street Fighter II. Stage selection tied to opponent or character choice.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Ryu's stage (features Cammy vs. Fei-Long example)

notable_level_patterns.description: Eight-player single-elimination tournament across four networked cabinets. Three sets: initial eliminations, semifinals, finals. Player reseeding based on outcome.
